notices.title: Legal notices
notices.intro: The information below identifies the publisher of this website and how to contact the team, as required by applicable law.
notices.publisherBody: This website and {{companyName}} services are published by {{companyName}}, an at-home laundry and dry-cleaning business. Address: {{address}}.
notices.contactBody: For any question about the website or our services, please use the contact form, write to {{supportEmail}}, or use {{contactEmail}}.
notices.hostingBody: Application infrastructure and data are hosted according to the practices of the hosting provider used for production. For hosting-related technical requests, please contact {{companyName}} through the channels mentioned above.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: {{companyName}} respects your privacy. This page describes how we process data in connection with our services.
privacy.addressesBody: Pickup and delivery addresses you provide are kept to perform the contract and plan routes (logistics, time slots, order tracking). They are not used for advertising without your separate consent.
privacy.paymentsBody: Card data and online payments are handled exclusively by Stripe, a certified payment provider. {{companyName}} does not store your full card numbers on its own servers. This processing is based on contract performance and legal obligations; further details are available in Stripe's privacy policy.
privacy.stripeGdpr: Using Stripe supports GDPR compliance: sensitive payment data is minimised on {{companyName}} systems and transactions are secured by a specialised provider.

gdpr.title: Personal data protection (GDPR)
gdpr.intro: Under Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR), you have the following rights regarding personal data we process in the context of our services.
gdpr.accessBody: You may obtain confirmation as to whether personal data concerning you are being processed and receive a copy, within the limits set by law.
gdpr.rectifyBody: You may request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data, including from your customer area (profile, addresses) where available.
gdpr.deleteTitle: Right to erasure (“right to be forgotten”)
gdpr.deleteBody: You may request deletion of your data where the law allows (for example after account closure and applicable retention periods). Some data may be retained where the law requires it (invoicing, transaction records).
gdpr.outro: To exercise your rights, contact us via the contact form or write to {{supportEmail}} ({{companyName}}). We will respond within the time limits set by the GDPR.

landing.heroDescription: Order, track and receive your clean laundry right at your door. Simple, fast and professional.

landing.step2Desc: An employee picks up your laundry at home

apiPage.title: API & backups
apiPage.subtitle: Manage API keys and download a portable data export (GDPR data portability).
apiPage.keysCardHint: Keys allow programmatic access to protected endpoints (subject to server configuration).
apiPage.generateModalDescription: Add a label so you can recognize this key in the list.
apiPage.revealedHint: Copy it now — the full secret will not be shown again after you close this dialog.
apiPage.revokeDescription: Integrations using this key will stop working. This cannot be undone.
apiPage.backupNote: Automatic backups are performed daily on our secure servers.

timeSlots.deleteConfirmDescription: If non-cancelled appointments exist, the slot will be deactivated instead of removed.
